tool_purpose: DeepLabv3 is a state-of-the-art deep learning model for image segmentation. It assigns a semantic label to each pixel in the input image, allowing for a more detailed understanding of the image content. This model is trained on the PASCAL VOC 2012 dataset and achieves a mean intersection-over-union (mIoU) score of 0.897. Framework: TensorFlow Hub. Functionality: Image segmentation model. API call: hub.load('https://tfhub.dev/tensorflow/deeplabv3_257_mv_gpu/1').
usage_warnings: Tool does not expose top-level input properties.
